case_title: NAIEM DUDUM VS. JUANITA ARANDA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUDUM, NAIEM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARANDA, JUANITA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 831 HOLLOWAY AVE. S.F. CA. 94112 AND 837 HOLLOWAY AVE. S.F. CA. 94112, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT ARANDA, JUANITA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUDUM, NAIEM AS TO DEFENDANT ARANDA, JUANITA DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUDUM, NAIEM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARANDA, JUANITA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 831 HOLLOWAY AVE AND 837 HOLLOWAY AVE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $5,370.86 RENT, $1,544.10 ATTORNEY FEES, $454.60 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,369.56, LEASE FORFEITED, AMENDED UNLAWFUL DETAINER DEFAULT JUDGMENT - SEE SCANNED DOC
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUDUM, NAIEM SERVED APR-07-2004, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT ARANDA, JUANITA
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUDUM, NAIEM
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF AMENDED DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUDUM, NAIEM
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT ARANDA, JUANITA

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ARANDA, JUANITA
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUDUM, NAIEM SERVED APR-07-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ARANDA, JUANITA
